title: eriophorum × medium
intro: Eriophorum × medium is a hybrid plant species, resulting from the cross between Eriophorum angustifolium and Eriophorum vaginatum, commonly known as cotton-grass or tussock cotton-grass. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriophorum × medium are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Eriophorum × medium can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to limited research and potential interactions with other medications.
